title: Whispers of the Dark
description: A chilling horror modpack filled with fear, darkness, and survival challenges. Dare to enter the unknown?
body:
Step into a world where darkness never sleeps.
Whispers of the Dark is a horror-themed modpack designed to test your courage and survival skills. From terrifying creatures lurking in the shadows to unsettling ambient sounds and cursed dimensions, every step you take will feel like your last.

🔹 Features:

Creepy atmospheres with immersive horror sound effects

Deadly mobs that stalk you in the night

Survival challenges where r
esources are scarce

Unique progression system to keep the tension high

Hand-picked mods for the ultimate horror experience

Are you brave enough to survive the whispers that call from the dark?

mowzies 's mobs mod link : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs

citadel mod link : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel
